'''Bethars''' was a celestial body<ref name="GG7">''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]''</ref> located in the [[Bethars system/Legends|Bethars system]], a part of the [[Emmo sector/Legends|Emmo sector]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Kant Aryon]], who was the [[Gender/Legends|son]] of a [[Baron/Legends|baron]] and a [[Baroness/Legends|baroness]] and was age thirty-two by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], [[Homeworld/Legends|hailed]] from Bethars.<ref name="GG7" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bethars was mentioned in [[Martin Wixted]]'s [[1993]] [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' sourcebook ''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]''.<ref name="GG7" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Bethars [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square M-12.<ref name="TEA" />
